About

Geophysics Researcher

I'm a geophysics researcher focused on seismic data analysis, earthquake early warning systems, and computational methods for real-time hazard assessment. My work bridges signal processing, machine learning, and domain expertise to build reliable systems for earthquake monitoring.

Research Interests

Seismic Data Processing

Developing automated algorithms for earthquake detection, phase picking, and magnitude estimation using machine learning approaches.

Earthquake Early Warning Systems

Building real-time seismic monitoring pipelines with optimized parameter estimation for rapid and accurate hazard assessment.

Seismic Hazard Analysis

Analyzing ground motion characteristics and probabilistic seismic hazard modeling for infrastructure resilience.

Knowledge Graph Integration

Connecting seismic metadata into structured knowledge systems for enhanced data discovery and analysis.

Education

Bachelor of Science in Geophysics

2019 – 2026

Universitas Gadjah Mada

  • GPA: 3.35 / 4.00
  • Specialization: Signal Processing, Statistical Analysis, Scientific Computing

Career Timeline

2026

Research Assistant

Geoseismal Research Center

Continuing seismic research with focus on computational methods and real-time data processing pipelines.

BMKG

Developed EEW data pipelines and magnitude estimation algorithms for Indonesia's seismic network.

Teaching Assistant

UGM

Mentored undergraduates in Python for scientific computing and computational methods.

Began Studies

Universitas Gadjah Mada
